title: MilkDrop Visualizer
description: Preset-driven feedback visualizer in the lineage of Ryan Geiss's MilkDrop, with blend transitions, live source editing, and import/export flows.
firstRunHint: Start with the curated preset browser, then toggle autoplay to hear smooth blend transitions.

starterPreset.label: aurora feedback starter
starterPreset.description: Balanced feedback and blend settings for a quick first run.
